panelText: Available voices 5 Default speaker control (experimental) SelectedSpeaker prompt slot A (text prompt-guided) (experimental) Speaker prompt slot B (text prompt-guided) (experimental) Reference audio slot 1 (speaker sample) (experimental) Custom reference audio (user-provided sample) (experimental) Available languages 3 Auto (infer script language from narration text) English script (en-US) SelectedChinese/Mandarin script (zh-CN) Some voice models use prompt/reference-audio style speaker control instead of a fixed catalog. For these providers (including VibeVoice-style setups), keep voice selections as guidance and rely on model prompts/reference inputs for final speaker tone; language coverage can be narrower than standard TTS catalogs.
audioModelValue: VibeVoice 1.5B (long-form) - Blocked • Official local usage is disabled upstream for this runtime. • VibeVoice local usage is blocked until upstream enables official support.
